prompt: Create a photorealistic vertical outdoor selfie of a young woman standing in a sunny park beneath a bright blue sky with scattered soft white clouds. The camera is held low and close at arm’s length, creating a wide-angle smartphone selfie perspective with the left forearm extending toward the bottom left foreground and the upper body filling the lower half of the frame. The woman has dark brown long, thick, naturally wavy hair blowing slightly in the breeze, wears a plain white sleeveless fitted top, and raises one arm high overhead toward the top right corner with an open relaxed hand. Her face is intentionally obscured by a centered square pixel-like privacy block in a medium brown skin-tone gradient, covering the entire facial area while leaving hair, neck, shoulders, and arm visible. Background: green leafy trees along the bottom edge and right side, open sky dominating the upper two thirds. Lighting is natural midday sunlight, crisp but flattering, with realistic skin texture, hair detail, cloud texture, and casual candid energy. No text, no watermark, no extra people, no artificial studio look.
